quests.title: The Trinity
quests.description: Use these 3 specific words: sun, window, and train.

quests.title: Nature's Call
quests.description: Incorporate the words 'tree', 'river', and 'mountain' in your message.

quests.title: Urban Explorer
quests.description: Use the words 'street', 'coffee', and 'crowd' in your text.

quests.title: Sweet Greetings
quests.description: Mention at least two different types of fruit.

quests.title: Color Palette
quests.description: Include at least three different colors in your description.

quests.title: Weather Report
quests.description: Use the words 'cloud', 'wind', and 'warmth'.

quests.title: Time Traveler
quests.description: Mention 'yesterday', 'today', and 'tomorrow'.

quests.title: Four-Part Tale
quests.description: Tell a complete story using exactly 4 sentences.

quests.title: Double Curiosity
quests.description: Include at least 2 questions (sentences ending with '?').

quests.title: Short & Sweet
quests.description: Write exactly 10 words in your entire postcard.

quests.title: The Enthusiast
quests.description: End at least 3 sentences with an exclamation mark (!).

quests.title: List Maker
quests.description: Include a list of 3 items separated by commas.

quests.title: The Essayist
quests.description: Write a long message with more than 50 words.

quests.title: One Breath
quests.description: Write your entire postcard in just one single sentence.

quests.title: Shouting from Afar
quests.description: Write your entire postcard using ONLY CAPITAL LETTERS.

quests.title: Quiet Whispers
quests.description: Write your entire postcard using only lowercase letters.

quests.title: Numerical Order
quests.description: Start every sentence with a number (1., 2., 3., etc.).

quests.title: First Impressions
quests.description: Every sentence must start with the same letter.

quests.title: No E-Zone
quests.description: Write a message without using the letter 'e' at all.

quests.title: Lucky Seven
quests.description: Use exactly 7 words that have 7 letters or more.

quests.title: Alpha & Omega
quests.description: Start your first sentence with 'A' and your last sentence with 'Z'.

quests.title: Rhyme Time
quests.description: Ensure the last words of your first and second sentence rhyme.

quests.title: Lipogrammatic
quests.description: Do not use the word 'and' in your entire text.

quests.title: The Haiku Spirit
quests.description: Write 3 sentences with roughly 5, 7 and 5 words each.

quests.title: Action Packed
quests.description: Use at least 5 different verbs ending in '-ing'.

quests.title: Vowel Hunter
quests.description: Include a word that contains at least 3 vowels in a row (e.g., 'beautiful').

quests.title: Double Trouble
quests.description: Use at least 3 words that have double letters (e.g., 'look', 'street').

quests.title: Mirror World
quests.description: Start and end your postcard with the exact same word.

quests.title: Foreign Flair
quests.description: Include one word in a language other than English.

quests.title: The Minimalist
quests.description: Write a message using only words with 4 letters or less.

quests.title: Triple Letter
quests.description: Use at least 3 words starting with the same letter.

quests.title: Animal Kingdom
quests.description: Mention at least 2 animals.

quests.title: Question Master
quests.description: Start your postcard with a question mark sentence.

quests.title: Emoji Energy
quests.description: Include at least 3 emojis.

quests.title: Weekend Mood
quests.description: Use both words 'Saturday' and 'Sunday'.

quests.title: Fast Counter
quests.description: Write exactly 20 words.

quests.title: Tiny Words
quests.description: Use at least 10 words with only 3 letters.

quests.title: Travel Bag
quests.description: Mention 'passport', 'ticket', and 'hotel'.

quests.title: Morning Routine
quests.description: Use the words 'coffee', 'breakfast', and 'alarm'.

quests.title: Ocean Life
quests.description: Mention 'fish', 'wave', and 'boat'.

quests.title: Countdown
quests.description: Include the numbers 1, 2, and 3 somewhere in the text.

quests.title: Symmetry
quests.description: Write 2 sentences with the same number of words.

quests.title: Food Lover
quests.description: Mention at least 3 different foods.

quests.title: Night Owl
quests.description: Use the words 'moon', 'star', and 'dark'.

quests.title: The Repeater
quests.description: Use the same word 5 times.

quests.title: ABC
quests.description: Include words starting with A, B, and C.

quests.title: Punctuation Party
quests.description: Use a question mark, comma, and exclamation mark.

quests.title: Long Journey
quests.description: Write at least 5 sentences.

quests.title: Mini Journey
quests.description: Write only 2 sentences.

quests.title: Mirror Numbers
quests.description: Include the same number twice.

quests.title: Frozen World
quests.description: Use the words 'snow', 'ice', and 'cold'.

quests.title: Happy Ending
quests.description: End your postcard with an exclamation mark.

quests.title: Starting Strong
quests.description: Start your postcard with the word 'Today'.

quests.title: Capital Start
quests.description: Every sentence must start with a capital letter.

quests.title: Double Question
quests.description: Use exactly 2 question marks.

quests.title: Treasure Hunt
quests.description: Mention 'map', 'gold', and 'island'.

quests.title: Movie Night
quests.description: Use the words 'popcorn', 'movie', and 'screen'.

quests.title: Rainbow
quests.description: Mention the colors red, blue, and green.

quests.title: Speed Run
quests.description: Write a message with fewer than 15 words.

quests.title: Double Space
quests.description: Use at least 2 commas in your postcard.

quests.title: Pet Lover
quests.description: Mention a cat and a dog.

quests.title: Four Corners
quests.description: Write exactly 4 sentences.

quests.title: Alphabet Soup
quests.description: Use every vowel at least once.

quests.title: Repeated Ending
quests.description: End 3 sentences with the same word.

quests.title: The Counter
quests.description: Use at least 25 words.

quests.title: Excited Writer
quests.description: Use at least 5 exclamation marks.

quests.title: Pairing Up
quests.description: Use at least 4 words that rhyme.

quests.title: Tiny Sentence
quests.description: Include a sentence with only 2 words.

quests.title: Clock Watcher
quests.description: Mention a specific time like 3:45 or 12:00.

quests.title: Direction Finder
quests.description: Use north, south, east, and west.
